calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-08-2006 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-08-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: SALLY MORIN FOR PLAINTIFF MARGUERITE LI
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY JEFFREY SPAHN FOR DEFENDANT LLYUDMILA ZELTSER; NATALY ARNON,
RUSSIAN INTERPRETOR FOR DEFENDANT PRESENT
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS:DEFENDANT TO PAY PLAINTIFF $1645.04 (BACKRENT FROM JAN 1,2006 TO FEB 28, 2006). THIS AMOUNT WAS PAID AT TODAYS SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. DEFENDANT TO PAY $982.20 POSTMARKED BY THE 1ST OF EACH MONTH STARTING ON 3/1/06. IF THE 1ST IS ON A SUNDAY, THE POSTMARK MAY BE THE 2ND. FROM 4/1/06 TO 3/08 DEFENDANT TO PAY ATTORNEY FEES OF $50 EACH MONTH FOR A TOTAL OF $1200. ALL PAYMENTS TO BE MADE BY MONEY ORDER OR CASHIERS CHECK. DEFENDANT T0 DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE ALL COMPLAINTS WITH THE RENT BOARD OR OTHER GOVERNMENT AGENCIES. GENERAL RELEASE BY ALL PARTIES. DEFENDANT HAS AUTHORITY TO BIND ALL OTHER OCCUPANTS TO THIS AGREEMENT. ALL PARTIES WAIVE JURY TRIAL. UPON COMPLIANCE, PLAINTIFF TO FILE DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE.
IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY, WITH 24 HOUR PHONE NOTICE, PLAINTIFF TO SEEK JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION OF 518 - 38TH AVE #8, DAMAGES, COSTS AND ATTORNEY FEES.
ALL PARTIES AGREE AND SO ORDERED.

JUDGE PRO TEM:IRVING PFEFFER ;CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE (218)

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Feb-01-2006 Denied
